title: The Millerson Case
writer: Gordon Rigby, Carlton Sand, Raymond L. Schrock
actors: Warner Baxter, Nancy Saunders, Clem Bevans
plot: In the 8th film of Columbia's "Crime Doctor" series, Dr. Robert Ordway is vacationing in the Blue Ridge Mountains district of West Virginia when a typhoid epidemic breaks out. Three deaths occur with the first two being typhoid-ca...
